overall.description: First-person exploration through a misty grassland environment in a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2). The player walks through tall grass and scattered trees under an overcast dusk sky, passing rocky outcrops and encountering wildlife before approaching a collectible flower.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy hillside with scattered deciduous trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward a pair of prominent trees on the hillside

entered.detail: large dark boulder sitting in the tall grass on the right side of the field
two prominent deciduous trees standing together on the hillside ahead
grassy incline rising up to the left with scattered vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide grassy hillside under an overcast dusk sky. The camera moves forward through tall grass toward a pair of prominent trees, with a large boulder visible to the right and a gentle slope rising on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy slope with rocky cliff formation on left side

events.description: large dark animal (appears to be a bear or bison) becomes visible standing in the tall grass on the right side of the field

agents.ego_description: continuing along the hillside path with a rocky cliff face now on the left, passing by wildlife in the field

notable_agents.action: large dark animal standing in the tall grass, possibly grazing or observing the surroundings

entered.detail: steep rocky outcrop with dark stone visible on the left side of the path
cluster of evergreen pine trees on the right side of the field

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the initial trees and boulder, revealing a rocky cliff face on the left. As the player continues walking through the tall grass, a large dark animal becomes visible in the field to the right. The terrain remains open with scattered pine trees visible ahead.

events.description: game UI prompt 'PICK AND EXAMINE FLOWER' appears at bottom right, indicating an interactive collectible item is nearby

agents.ego_description: approaching a wildflower patch to collect it, as indicated by the on-screen interaction prompt

entered.detail: thick cluster of tall pine trees forming the edge of a forest ahead
small blue wildflowers growing in the grass that can be picked
semi-transparent game interface text reading 'PICK AND EXAMINE FLOWER' with controller button icon

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the edge of a dense pine forest where the terrain becomes more enclosed. At around 50 seconds, a game UI prompt appears indicating a collectible flower nearby. The player continues moving toward the wildflowers as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement across an open, grassy hillside that gradually transitions into the enclosed edge of a dense pine forest. It begins by gliding through tall grass under an overcast dusk sky, passing a large boulder and a pair of prominent trees. As the camera pushes forward, the open terrain shifts to reveal a rocky cliff face on the left and a large dark animal grazing in the field to the right. The scene then narrows as the camera approaches a cluster of pine trees, moving from the wide expanse of the hillside into a more sheltered environment. Finally, the movement leads toward a patch of wildflowers as a UI prompt appears, signaling the discovery of a collectible.
